compiled_state.title: Add escalate_review to validate-review-output.sh optional_top and array validation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add escalate_review to validate-review-output.sh code-review-dispatch validation context:
1. Add 'escalate_review' to optional_top set at line 219: optional_top = {'review_tier', 'escalate_review'}
2. Add validation logic: if 'escalate_review' is present, it must be a list. Each element must have 'finding_index' (int) and 'reason' (string). Empty list is valid. Null is invalid — omit the field instead.
3. Validate finding_index values reference valid indices in the findings array.

This change makes write-reviewer-findings.sh accept the escalate_review field via delegation (line 109).

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] escalate_review in optional_top
  Verify: grep -q 'escalate_review' plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh
- [ ] Validation accepts valid escalate_review array
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Read validate-review-output.sh (lines ~202-314 are the code-review-dispatch validator) and test file (RED tests at lines ~1200-1305). Key location: optional_top = {'review_tier'} at line 219, validate_code_review_dispatch function. RED tests expect: (1) valid escalate_review array passes, (2) escalate_review as string fails with type error message, (3) element missing finding_index fails with specific message ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: RED tests confirmed failing as expected. All 3 escalate_review tests FAIL: valid array rejected as unexpected key, string type error message mismatch, missing finding_index message mismatch ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Implementation complete. Added 'escalate_review' to optional_top set and added validation block: type check (must be array), per-element validation (finding_index required int in bounds, reason required non-empty string). Empty array is valid. ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: All 75 tests pass (PASSED: 75, FAILED: 0). Implementation verified GREEN. Also fixed typo in test fixture: correctness score was 5 but minor finding requires 4 per score-severity consistency rule. ✓
comments.author: Test
